name: Garlic & Chickpea Dip
recipeIngredient: 2 Garlic bulbs, boiled whole for 20 minutes, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the chickpeas until well pureed.
2. Squeeze the garlic cloves from their skins and add them to the chickpeas.
3. Add olive oil, lemon juice, and tahini; blend again.
4. Incorporate black pepper and chopped parsley, mixing well.
5. Transfer the mixture into an oiled mold and chill for 2 hours.
6. Turn out onto a plate and garnish with tomato wedges or slices.
